ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the patient's address */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy" TEXT /* Patient's insurance policy number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the diagnosis is recorded */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "code_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code list used for the diagnosis */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the diagnosis */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the diagnosis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnosis (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the diagnosis (if any) */,
  "fields" TEXT /* Additional fields related to the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms associated with the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_code_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_list_id") REFERENCES code_lists ("code_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_lists" (
  "code_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code list */,
  "code_list_name" TEXT /* Name of the code list */,
  "code_list_description" TEXT /* Description of the code list */,
  "code_list_version" TEXT /* Version of the code list */,
  "code_list_url" TEXT /* URL of the code list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnosis the code is associated with */,
  "code_system" TEXT /* System where the code is defined (e.g., SNOMED-CT, ICD-9-CM) */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  "code_status" TEXT /* Status of the code (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_codes_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the treatment plan is created */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnosis the treatment plan is associated with */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "plan_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment step */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan the step belongs to */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment step */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the step in the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the step was completed */,
  "step_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the treatment step */,
  "step_assignee" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the treatment step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_steps_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical note */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the note is recorded */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnosis the note is related to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was recorded */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the clinical note */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who recorded the note */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the clinical note */,
  "note_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the clinical note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_notes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_notes_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "author_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the author */,
  "author_credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the author (e.g., MD, RN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Dr., Nurse) */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
